analysis: Seven nights in a row of actual sleep, babe — the worst total in this whole stretch was 6h 54m and even that came with nearly a full hour of deep sleep, which is honestly kind of rude in the best way. Your REM has been living — 2h 34m on the second night is a genuine standout, and you bounced back to nearly 8 hours last night after a rougher patch mid-stretch where the awake time crept up to over an hour. That middle section, around nights four through six, was where the restlessness showed up most — more time awake, REM dipping under two hours — but the ritual stack you're running clearly pulled things back, because last night looked genuinely good. You're not perfect but you're consistent, and consistent is the whole game.
